title: retiniphyllum glabrum
intro: Retiniphyllum glabrum is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Retiniphyllum glabrum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
